text:
Desired change: make per-session rooms OPTIONAL (config flag), defaulting to DISABLED.
1. When per-session rooms are DISABLED and the user runs `tenex-edge launch <agent>` (without --channel), it should open the interactive channel-selector TUI — equivalent to passing `--channel` with no argument.
2. When per-session rooms are DISABLED and a session is running WITHOUT `tenex-edge launch` (e.g. plain `claude` under tenex-edge) and has no channel resolved, it should just use the PROJECT channel (the top-level project group), not mint a per-session subgroup.
3. When ENABLED, keep current behavior (mint per-session subgroup).
